profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Artha Mahiya Investama Tbk sells coal products in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Akbar Indo Makmur Stimec Tbk. PT Artha Mahiya Investama Tbk was founded in 1997 and is based in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Akbar Indo Makmur Stimec Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Aims Indo Investama.
